pi_items.source: Task setup scripts (setup_task.sh line 12, export_result.sh line 12) consistently use this title as the expected page name. Verified in multiple task configuration files.

Extensive web search and GitHub analysis of Drupal Commerce 2.x core modules. Core checkout panes found: 'login', 'contact_information', 'billing_information', 'payment_information', 'payment_process', 'completion_message'. The pane ID 'commerce_checkout_terms_of_service' does not appear in Drupal Commerce core code, official documentation (docs.drupalcommerce.org), GitHub repository (drupalcommerce/commerce 8.x-2.x branch), or any contributed modules searched (commerce_agree_terms, commerce_extra_panes, etc.). The environment setup script (setup_drupal_commerce.sh) only installs core Commerce modules and does not install any contributed modules that would provide this pane ID. The verifier.py code references this pane ID (line 70) but it does not exist in standard Drupal Commerce installations.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects a page titled 'Terms and Conditions' to be created, which is correct and verified in the task configuration. However, the claimed checkout pane ID 'commerce_checkout_terms_of_service' does not exist in Drupal Commerce 2.x core or documented contributed modules. Core Commerce checkout panes include 'login', 'contact_information', 'billing_information', 'payment_information', 'payment_process', and 'completion_message'. The pane ID in the metadata cannot be verified as a real Drupal Commerce pane.
